assertions.assertion: Program.cs registers RedisPersistedGrantStore as IPersistedGrantStore using AddTransient or AddScoped
Program.cs registers RedisDeviceFlowStore as IDeviceFlowStore using AddTransient or AddScoped
Program.cs does not call AddOperationalStore for EF Core since custom stores replace it
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows custom stores registered directly without AddOperationalStore.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs still calls AddIdentityServer() for the core IdentityServer registration
